params.name: Super Evolution Cell
params.description: This supercell came from Hitman No.51. It used to be a mob from Gene Simulation, but after being defeated by the snail over and over again, it had a change of heart and started thinking about fundamental questions about the universe. Eventually, it contacted the Demon Gods, became a Hitman, and was then made into a Relic.
